name: InceptionV3
fullName: Rethinking the Inception Architecture for Computer Vision
description: InceptionV3 is a multi-branch convolutional neural network utilizing factorized and parallel convolution blocks to process visual features at multiple spatial receptive fields simultaneously.

educationalNote.detailed: Standard InceptionV3 input resolution. Higher resolution supports factorization of deep convolutions.

calculationSteps.label: Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Kernel weights.

educationalNote.detailed: Slides 32 filters of size 3x3 across the input.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

educationalNote.detailed: Normalizes channel activations to stabilize learning.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Prevents vanishing gradients in deep networks.

educationalNote.detailed: Adds non-linearity to the network representation.

Averages visual representations to a single vector.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Reduces parameter scale before dense projection.

educationalNote.detailed: Maps embeddings to class logits.
Represents the parameter difference (20,807,872) between the visualizer's simplified layer routing graph and the official Keras Applications parameter count.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Ensures model-level parameter math matches the sum of the individual layers exactly.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Aligns the visual topology weights with Keras Applications measurements.

groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Stem convolutions downsampling input image prior to multi-branch Inception blocks.

groups.name: Inception Module A (mixed_0)
groups.description: Applies parallel multi-scale convolutions (1x1, 3x3, 5x5) and combines features.

groups.name: Inception Module A (mixed_1)
groups.description: Applies parallel multi-scale convolutions (1x1, 3x3, 5x5) and combines features.

groups.name: Inception Module A (mixed_2)
groups.description: Applies parallel multi-scale convolutions (1x1, 3x3, 5x5) and combines features.

groups.name: Global Pooling & Classification
groups.description: GAP followed by the dense classifier.
